Component.Name: EndPackNumVarEdit
Component.Caption: sEndingPackingSlip
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPckHdrs( PROPERTIES(PackNum, CoNum, PackDate, CaddrName) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4)FILTER(DerUninvoiced AND CoStat IS NOT NULL)ORDERBY(PackNum, CoNum))

Component.Name: StartPackNumVarEdit
Component.Caption: sStartingPackingSlip
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPckHdrs( PROPERTIES(PackNum, CoNum, PackDate, CaddrName) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4)FILTER(DerUninvoiced AND CoStat IS NOT NULL)ORDERBY(PackNum, CoNum))

EventHandler.Name: CreateFromPackingSlip
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(Set:#V(InvCred), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "I", Set:#V(ProgressiveBill), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "0", Set:#V(StartShipmentVar), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndShipmentVar), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartOrderNum), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndOrderNum), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartLine), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndLine), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartRelease), #V(CreateFromPack
EventHandler.Response2: SlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndRelease), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartLastShipDate), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndLastShipDate), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(LastShipDateIncrement), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 1, "0", Set:#V(StartPackNumVar), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 0, "", Set:#V(EndPackNumVar), #V(CreateFromPackSlipVar) = 0, "")

EventHandler.Name: CreateFromShipment
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(Set:#V(InvCred), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "I", Set:#V(ProgressiveBill), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "0", Set:#V(StartOrderNum), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndOrderNum), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartLine), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndLine), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, , Set:#V(StartRelease), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndRelease), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartPackNumVar), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar
EventHandler.Response2: ) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndPackNumVar), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(StartLastShipDate), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(EndLastShipDate), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "", Set:#V(LastShipDateIncrement), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 1, "0", Set:#V(StartShipmentVar), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 0, "", Set:#V(EndShipmentVar), #V(CreateFromShipmentVar) = 0, "")

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PrintRule, VAR V(PrintLabelDef), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PCity, VAR V(City), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLPrintTariffCode, VAR V(PLPrintTariffCode), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PrintWord, VAR V(PrintWord), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLSalesDate, VAR V(PLSalesDate), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateVariables
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR PLFinalPrintOut, VAR V(FinalPrintoutVar), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: PLEnsureQRCodePrintOut
EventHandler.Response: SLPLKSeFDocuments.EnsureQRs( PARMS(VAR V(StartInvNum), VAR 0, MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PLSubmitReportInvoicing
EventHandler.Response: ACTION(GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PREVIEW) = PREVIEW, PLSubmitReportInvoicingPreview, GenEventRet:"ThisForm", #V(PREVIEW) <> PREVIEW, PLSubmitReportInvoicingProcess)

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLInvHdrs.OrderInvCrMemoPredisplaySp( PARMS(VAR V(User_UserID), RVAR V(IsUserInReprintGrp), RVAR V(AvailFRFinVar), RVAR V(Result), MESSAGE, RVAR V(UsePrePrintedForms), RVAR V(LinesPerInv), RVAR V(LinesPerDM), RVAR V(LinesPerCM)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) IGNOREFAILURE() )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCtps.CanAnySp( PARMS(VAR Order Entry Invoicing, VAR, RVAR V(IsUserInInvoicingGrp)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartInvNum), VAR V(EndInvNum), VAR V(StartOrderNum), VAR V(EndOrderNum), VAR V(StartInvDate), VAR V(EndInvDate), VAR V(StartCustNum), VAR V(EndCustNum), VAR V(CalledFrom), VAR V(SessionID))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: Function ValidateFields(ByVal PrintProcess as String) as Integer
'This functions check whether the invoice length is set in the coparms table or not
'It checks for the variable that is returned from the SP and closes the form if the
' (Use Profile is off) or (Use Profile is on and Doc Profile does not exist)
' (Use Profile is on and Doc Profile exists)
' set variable ProcessReprint as PROCESS for the first call to generate report,
' and set variable ProcessReprint as REPRINT for subsequent calls to generate report
If ThisForm.Variables("FormType").Value = "1" Or ThisForm.Variables("FormType").Value = "D" Or ThisForm.Variables("FormType").Value = "F" Then
'Check the Delivery/Inco Terms and EU Details check boxes for
' Default to detail (FormType 3) when France Country pack is active
Dim ir As InvokeRequestData = New InvokeRequestData()
Dim taski() As String = response.Parameters(2).Value.Split(New String() {"|"}, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
For Each task As String In taski
